summary: Base Indicators Live Game Hide Spoilers OFF
description:
GIVEN a game is in-progress
AND Hides Spoilers is set to OFF

steps.action: WHEN base runners are safe on a base
steps.result:
THEN the corresponding base indicator is displayed in yellow
AND base indicators are displayed in gray if there is not a corresponding safe base runner
AND the square 1st, 2nd, and 3rd base indicators are displayed in a paw print orientation
AND the right base indicator corresponds to 1st base
AND the center base indicator corresponds to 2nd base
AND the left base indicator corresponds to 3rd base
AND the base indicators are center-right justified above the out indicators in the non-matchup portion of the game tile
